titleStmt.title: SII 5.724: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 724. (A.R. No. 160 of 1895). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SHRINE IN THE KAILASAPATI TEMPLE AT GANGAIKO NDAN, TINNEVELLY TALUK, TINNEVELLY DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaśśi vāya . svasti śrī .. tirumakaḷ
polap perunilac celviyum
taṉakke yurimaipūṇṭamai maṉakko
ḷak kāṉtaḷūrcālai kalamaṟu
ttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭum kaṅ
kapāṭiyum ṉuḷampāṭiyum
taṭikai pāṭiyum kuṭamalaiṉāṭuṅ
kollamuṅ kaliṅkamuṅ Eṇṭicai
pukaḻtaru Iḻamaṇlamuṅ laṭṭapāṭi Ēḻa
rai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāṟ
k koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyu ḷellā yāṇṭum to
ḻuteka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecuko
ḷ śrīkoirājairāja Irājakecaripaṉ(ma)rāṉa [śrīi]
rājairājairājatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 vatu Irā
jairājamaṇṭalattu kiḻkaḷakūṟṟattu
brahate yam śrīval labha maṅkalattu śrīkai yilā
yattu kṣettirapālarkku tiruvamitu cey Oru
potaikku Arici nāṉāḻiyāka Iraṇṭu potaikku Ari
ci Eṇṇā ḻiyum Aṉtiyampotu tiruvārātaṉai muṭiñca
vāṟe Appaamitu ceyya Arici nāḻi Uriyum Arddhayā
mattukku tiruamitu ceyya Arici nāṉāḻiyum Āka
Arici patiṉmuṉṉāḻi yurikku Iraṇṭañcākki van=ta nel
tūṇi Orunāḻi muḻakkum Iñnellu kkuttuvāḷ kū
li nel muṉṉāḻiyum Oru potai kku kaṟiamitu
Añcāka muṉṟu potaikku kaṟiamitukku nel mu
ṉṉāḻiyum taiyiramitu Oru potaikku Uriyāka I
raṇṭu potaikku tayiramutu nāḻiyum Arddha yāmattukku
taiyiramitu Uriyum Āka tayiramutu nāḻi Urikku nellu muṉṉāḻi
yum neyyamitu Oru potaikku Āḻākkāka muṉṟu potaikku ney
Amutu Uḻakku Āḻākkum [an=tiya] mpotu tiruārātaṉai muṭi
ñcavāṟe Āppaamitukku ney Āḻākkum Āka ney Urikku nel
Eṇṇāḻiyum Aṭaikkāy Amutu Oru potaikku nālāka nālu potai
kku Aṭaikkāy patiṉāṟukku nel Irunāḻi Ilaiamitu Oru potaikku pa
tiṉāṟāka nālu potai kku veṟṟilai Amutu Aṟupattu nālukku nellu nāṉāḻiyum
Āka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku nellu Eḻukuṟuṇi muḻakkāka Orāṇṭu muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟu
patu nāḷukkum nel Irunūṟṟu Orupat tirukalaṉey Irutūṇi kkuṟuṇi Aṟunā
ḻiyum mārkaḻit tiruviḻā Eṭukkum nāḷppaṭi Iraṭṭiccu koḷavārākavum tirumeypū
ccuc can=ta ṉañ śrīkaṇṭattu Orāṇṭaikku kācu Araiyu nti runun=tā viḷakku nālu
kku viḷakkoṉṟukku ney Uḻakkāka viḷakku nālukku ney nāḻiyum can=ti yātipam Añ
ciṉukku niccam ney Uḻakkāka Oru nāḷaikku ney nāḻi Uḻakkāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟu A
ṟupatiṉukku ney nāṉūṟṟu Añ
patiṉāḻikku kācu Oṉṟukku ney nā
ṟpatināḻiyāka van=ta kācu patiṉoṉ
ṟe kālum tiruvārātaṉai ceyum
pirāmaṇanukku puṭavaimutalukku O
rāṭaiykku kācu Iraṇṭum canito
ṟum Eṇṇai kkāppu cāttiaruḷa cani Oṉ
ṟiṉukku Eṇṇai Āḻākkāka Orāṇṭukku Eṇṉaiy
Aṟunāḻikku vilai Akkam Iraṇṭum tiruppaḷ
ḷittāmam paṟiccu toṭuppāḷ Oruttikku puṭavai y mu
tal Orāṇṭai kku Akka nālum viṣu Ayaṉaṅkaḷukku sna pa
nañceyya veṇṭum vicattukku Akkam nāle kālum sna
pa nattukku Orāṇṭai kku Akkam Iraṇṭum yamanikaipuṭavai Iraṇṭu
kku Akkam munṟum An=ti yampotu Appam Amutuceyya caṟkarai
Araippalamum Amutuceyya muṉṟu potai kku caṟkaṟai Orupala varaiyu
m Āka Ōru ṉāḷaikku caṟkkarai Irupalamāka Orāṇṭukku caṟkkarai Eḻunūṟṟu
Irupatiṉ palattukku kācu nālarai yum Āka kācu patiṉeḻe mukkālumThe total is wrongly given.
Akkam pati(ṉ)ṉaiñce kāliṉālum kācu Oṉṟukku Akkam Eṭṭāka Akkam
Eṟṟi kācu patiṉeṭṭe mukkālum Akkam Eḻe kālukku(m)māka kācu Oṉ
ṟukku nel Eḻukalamāka van=ta nel muṉṉūṟṟuThe letter ṉū is written like � in the original.muppa tte ḻu
kalaṉe Eḻukuṟuṇi Oru nāḻiyum viṣu Ayaṉaṅkaḷukku sna pa
naṅ Āṭṭiaruḷa tirumuḷai Aṭṭa pālikai kkiḻ Aṭṭum nel ku
ṟuṇiyum kalacaṅkaḷiṉkiḻ Aṭṭu nel patakkum Arkkiyattukkum [sa]
ṇṭilattukkum Oṭukka Arici Irunāḻiyiṉāl nel Aññāḻiyum Āka vi
ṣu Ayaṉaṅkaḷ nā(ā)lukku nellu kalaṉe patakku nāṉāḻiyum Ittevar pa
ṇṭārattile śrīkai yilāyattu turkkai yārkku muṉṟu cantikku can=ta yātipam Oṉ
ṟukku ney Āḻākkāka Orāṇṭu muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟupatu nāḷaikku ney nāṟpattu
Aññāḻikku vilai kācu Oṉṟe Arai kkālukku nel Eḻukalaṉe Irutūṇipatakku
nāṉāḻiyum tiruppaḷḷitāmam paṟiccu toṭuppāḷ Oruttikku niccam
nel nāṉāḻi Āka Orāṇṭukku nel pati(ṉ)ṉaiñ kalamāka Orāṇṭaikku ne
l muṉṉūṟṟu Eḻupattu nāṟkalaṉe Añkuṟuṇi Eḻunāḻikku Aṭaitta
nilamāvatu kṣettirapālatevar Ivvūr cavai yār pakkal taṇ poruntattiṉ
teṉkarai terai kolli vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam kāle Araikkāṇi Arai- yum
Iśrīkai yilāyattutevar tevatāṉam Arikecarimaṅkalattu Eri Uṭaikuḷamā
y kāṭukoḷāy kkiṭan=ta maiyil Ivveri Ikṣettirapālatevar sva ṅ ko
ṇṭu Ieriyai y Iṉṉāṭu Uḷḷiṭṭa nāṭukaḷ Ivvāṇṭu vakai y cekiṉṟa neṟ
kuppai yuṭai yāṉ Āṉa Arai yaṉ Ampalakkūttaṉ śrīkāriyamāy kuḷattai
yum perukka karai yaṭṭuviccu kāṭum veṭṭuviccu maṭai kaḷum Eṭuppiccu parame
śva rapereri Eṉṟu periṭṭu Ikkuḷattiṉkiḻ kkāṭu veṭṭi kaṭṭai paṟiccu vaca
kki Aṭai ñcili Aṭai ya Iśrīkai yilāyattu Āḻvār Aruḷicceyya Ivvūr ca
vai yārum Ittevarkaṉmikaḷu(m)māy kuṭutta nilam Iraṇṭu veliyum virana
raṇaerikkiḻ talaivācalil śrīkai yilāyattu Āḻvār koyiliṉ te
ṟkil tiruccuṟṟālai A[ ṭai] ñc ce
kṣettirapālatevarkku tirunan=ta vāṉamāka mahāsabhai yom kuṭuppatāṉa
mai yil Itaṉukku talaimāṟā(ā)ka Arikecarimaṅkalamāṉa parameśvara
pererikkiḻ nilam Iraṭṭiyāka kaṇavatiyārkku kuṭutta nilam Irumā varai
yu(ma)māka Innilam Ittaṉaiyum koṇṭu Ippaṭiye celuttuvatā
kavum Itil mikiti kkuṟai mai Uḷḷatu Eppeṟpaṭṭatum Iśrīkai yilāya
ttu śrīkoyil nampuceyvāṉ kaṇkāṇiyoṭum Ikṣettirapālarkku
celuttuvatākavum Ippaṭi nivan=ta māka nivan=ta m ceytu kuṭuppatākap paṇittā
rā(ka)kil śrīkai yilāyakkṛ mavittar paṇikka Iḻakkan=ti ṟattu viṣṇu kkiramavitta
r paṇikka caṭaṅkavikkuṟicci cāttaṉakkunār paṇikka marutūr tiruveṅkaṭavam śrī
kraṣṇa paṭṭar paṇippaṇi Iṉāl paṇiccu kuṭuttom mahāsabhai yom ma
hāsabhai yaār paṇikka paṇipaṇiyāl Ikṣetrabālade var nilattai
Aṭai vu nilamāka kevuciyarkaḷi laṉṟu This line is damaged.
Digital edition of SII 5.724 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
